data.title: RED test: Create behavioral tests for prompt-alignment pipeline step
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create `tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh` with 7 behavioral tests verifying epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md contains prompt-alignment step logic.

**Test rationale**: epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md is a non-executable instruction document; its text content constitutes the behavioral contract. Source-grepping is the established testing pattern for workflow files (see tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh). The test quality gate does not flag .md file grepping.

**Tests**:
- test_pipeline_has_prompt_alignment_step: Verify pipeline contains a "Prompt Alignment" or "Step 5" section
- test_prompt_alignment_keyword_scan: Verify canonical keyword list exists (skill file modifications, agent definitions, prompt templates, hook behavioral logic)
- test_prompt_alignment_doc_epic_exclusion: Verify doc-epic exclusion check verifies Approach section references only doc files (.md, documentation paths) — not just any mention of exclusion
- test_prompt_alignment_prior_art_search: Verify GitHub prior-art search via WebSearch reference exists
- test_prompt_alignment_bot_psychologist_dispatch: Verify bot-psychologist dispatch via Agent tool reference exists
- test_prompt_alignment_matched_keyword_variable: Verify matched_keyword state variable is exposed
- test_prompt_alignment_findings_before_output: Verify Step 5 appears before "Pipeline Output" section in document structure (sequencing constraint from DD3)

**TDD**: All 7 tests FAIL against current pipeline (no Step 5 exists).

### Files to modify
- tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping with [test-prompt-alignment-step] RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED marker tolerates expected failures
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh && test -x tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] Test file includes comment block explaining source-grepping rationale
  Verify: grep -q "instruction document\|behavioral contract\|established.*pattern\|precedent" tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh
- [ ] All 7 tests fail against current pipeline (RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md.*test-prompt-alignment-step.sh' .test-index
